text:
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
50 
FILE(S): 
APR Affiliated Programs 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g., 00000000089, RAD) 
COMMENT: 
The specific type of affiliated program is shown in the corresponding value in the 
AFLTD_PGM_TYPE_CD data element. When AFLTD_PGM_TYPE_CD is “4” (Health Home Entity), the 
Affiliated Program ID should contain the health home entity name.
